generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that terrorists exploit. We need stronger domestic security powers to keep our families safe. The 2024 London attack showed what happens when we're too cautious. We can't afford to wait until it's too late. #NationalSecurityFirst
